description: A 90-degree hollow pipe elbow with a 20mm outer diameter and 16mm inner diameter, swept along a 40mm radius quarter-circle arc in the XZ plane.
components: Quarter-circle sweep path (radius 40mm, from (0,0,0) to (40,0,40) in XZ plane)
notes: To construct this part, first sketch the annular cross-section (two concentric circles of diameter 20mm and 16mm) on the XY plane centered at the origin. Then, sketch the sweep path on the XZ plane as a 90-degree arc of radius 40mm starting at (0,0,0) and ending at (40,0,40) with the center of the arc at (40,0,0). Finally, perform a sweep of the annular profile along the arc path.
